items.name: Phone number
items.sourceQuote: Signal requires a phone number to register.

items.name: Message metadata (minimal)
items.sourceQuote: Signal is designed to minimize the data we collect.

collectsPreciseGeolocation.sourceQuote: Signal does not collect location data.

collectsFinancialData.sourceQuote: No financial data is collected from users.

soldToThirdParties.sourceQuote: Signal does not sell, rent, or monetize your personal data or content in any way.

sharedForAdvertising.sourceQuote: Signal does not work with advertisers.

crossSiteTracking.sourceQuote: Signal does not track users across websites.

usedForProfiling.sourceQuote: Signal does not build profiles of its users.

usedToTrainAI.sourceQuote: Signal does not use user data to train AI models.

disclosedToLawEnforcement.sourceQuote: Signal cannot provide the contents of your messages or calls to law enforcement because they are end-to-end encrypted.

thirdPartyRecipients.sourceQuote: Signal does not share data with third parties.

provideCoreService.sourceQuote: Signal uses your data to provide encrypted messaging service.

securityFraudPrevention.sourceQuote: We may use minimal data to detect abuse.

legalRegulatoryCompliance.sourceQuote: Signal minimizes legal data obligations by not having access to content.

personalization.sourceQuote: Signal does not personalize content based on user data.

serviceImprovement.sourceQuote: Policy does not address service improvement data use.

paymentProcessing.sourceQuote: Signal accepts donations but does not store payment data.

aiMlTraining.sourceQuote: Signal does not use data for AI training.

thirdPartyDataPartnerships.sourceQuote: Signal has no third-party data partnerships.

retention.summary: Messages are stored only until delivered; logs kept up to 30 days.
retention.sourceQuote: Messages are stored only as long as necessary to deliver them.

rightToAccess.sourceQuote: You can request a copy of your data.

rightToDelete.sourceQuote: You can delete your account and all associated data at any time.

rightToCorrect.sourceQuote: No explicit right to correct mentioned in the policy.

rightToOptOut.sourceQuote: You may opt out of any data collection by deleting your account.

gpcDetail.sourceQuote: Signal respects global privacy control signals.

dntDetail.sourceQuote: Signal respects Do Not Track browser settings.

encryptedInTransit.sourceQuote: All messages are end-to-end encrypted using the Signal Protocol.

encryptedAtRest.sourceQuote: Policy does not explicitly address encryption at rest for server-side data.

breachNotification.sourceQuote: Policy does not address breach notification procedures.

additionalMeasures.name: Open-source audited protocol
additionalMeasures.sourceQuote: Signal Protocol is open source and independently audited.

additionalMeasures.name: Forward secrecy
additionalMeasures.sourceQuote: Signal uses forward secrecy to protect past communications.

independentAudits.sourceQuote: Signal Protocol is open source and has undergone independent security audits.
